metadata.title: Build an SRX ACE build agent that generates a local business website for a Canadian founder-operator, using the market_lens framework to adapt content and structure to local market conditions.

mission.primary_objective: Build an SRX ACE build agent that generates a local business website for a Canadian founder-operator, using the market_lens framework to adapt content and structure to local market conditions.
mission.success_definition: Agent produces a zip file containing index.html, about.html, services.html, contact.html, style.css, and a local-seo.json metadata file.; All pages pass W3C validation with zero errors.; Market_lens fields (region, language, competitor_count) are reflected in the SEO metadata and page content.; Fake_test_risk input triggers a warning log and generates a scaffold with '[PLACEHOLDER]' markers instead of crashing.; Validation gate rejects input with fewer than 4 of 6 required fields and returns a structured error report.

in_scope.item: The agent must accept a business profile (name, industry, location, services, target audience) and produce a complete static website with homepage, about, services, contact, and a local SEO metadata block. It must validate inputs against a market_lens schema (region, language, cultural cues, competitor density) and reject or flag ambiguous or missing fields.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Agent produces a zip file containing index.html, about.html, services.html, contact.html, style.css, and a local-seo.json metadata file.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: All pages pass W3C validation with zero errors.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Market_lens fields (region, language, competitor_count) are reflected in the SEO metadata and page content.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: Fake_test_risk input triggers a warning log and generates a scaffold with '[PLACEHOLDER]' markers instead of crashing.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 5
gate.pass_condition: Validation gate rejects input with fewer than 4 of 6 required fields and returns a structured error report.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.build_objective: Build an SRX ACE build agent that generates a local business website for a Canadian founder-operator, using the market_lens framework to adapt content and structure to local market conditions.

target_changes.item: The agent must accept a business profile (name, industry, location, services, target audience) and produce a complete static website with homepage, about, services, contact, and a local SEO metadata block. It must validate inputs against a market_lens schema (region, language, cultural cues, competitor density) and reject or flag ambiguous or missing fields.

implementation_steps.item: The agent must accept a business profile (name, industry, location, services, target audience) and produce a complete static website with homepage, about, services, contact, and a local SEO metadata block. It must validate inputs against a market_lens schema (region, language, cultural cues, competitor density) and reject or flag ambiguous or missing fields.

validation_gates.item: Agent produces a zip file containing index.html, about.html, services.html, contact.html, style.css, and a local-seo.json metadata file.
All pages pass W3C validation with zero errors.
Market_lens fields (region, language, competitor_count) are reflected in the SEO metadata and page content.
Fake_test_risk input triggers a warning log and generates a scaffold with '[PLACEHOLDER]' markers instead of crashing.
Validation gate rejects input with fewer than 4 of 6 required fields and returns a structured error report.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
